title: Desiny
description: A mod that refreshes the wilderness and decoration of Minecraft!
body:
## Update
This update, 'Wilder & Redesigned,' involves the complete overhaul of all textures, models, and features! We've pixelated old textures in the Jappa style, made old models more Minecraft-friendly, and improved or even added entirely new features that were previously non-functional.

Now available on Modrinth in its first version, but stay tuned for upcoming updates, with many already planned for version 1.21. Feel free to share any update suggestions; we welcome all feedback!

## Features
Now, let's talk about the features of this mod. As the name suggests, this mod focuses on updates related to nature and building in Minecraft. We've added new natural features like plants, animals, and other vegetation. You'll also find new beautiful blocks and decorative elements. But that's not all; this mod introduces minerals that can be used for crafting new items or even entirely new types of food and drinks that you might never see in Vanilla Minecraft.

![Design Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f4510058b06e4f9a468e29819710b4c3c96e850.png)
